rationale_overall: At cap=5, the watchlist is full and every incumbent has a concrete Q4 2024 catalyst supporting continued hold. NVDA reported record $35.1B Q3 FY25 revenue with Blackwell in full production (Nov 20, 2024). URA's nuclear thesis is reinforced by the Microsoft-Constellation Three Mile Island 20-year PPA (Sep 20, 2024), following Amazon-Talen and Google-Kairos deals earlier in the year. RKLB posted +55% YoY revenue in Q3, signed a Neutron commercial constellation customer, and won a USAF Archimedes engine contract. LNG remains the cleanest expression of the Russia-Ukraine geopolitical-energy wave the profile names. BOTZ keeps coarse robotics exposure intact. The named-but-absent quantum bucket (Google Willow, Dec 9, 2024) is a real gap, but at cap=5 with five healthy holdings, ejecting a working thesis position to chase a single chip announcement would be momentum-chasing, not the trim-before-crest discipline the profile asks for. Hold the line this quarter.
